title: Coinbase Launches Solana-Backed Loans via Morpho
summary: Coinbase users can now borrow up to $100,000 using their SOL holdings as collateral. This new service is powered by Morpho and operates on the Base blockchain.
body:
Coinbase has introduced a new loan service that allows users to borrow up to $100,000 by using their Solana (SOL) tokens as collateral. This feature is made possible through an integration with Morpho, a decentralized lending protocol, and operates on Coinbase's own Base blockchain.

This development is significant for everyday crypto users because it provides a way to access liquidity without having to sell their SOL holdings. Think of it like taking out a loan using your car as collateral—you get the money you need while still holding onto your asset. This can be particularly useful for those who believe in the long-term value of Solana but need cash for other opportunities or expenses.

If you hold SOL and are a Coinbase user, you can now explore this loan option. Keep an eye out for the terms and conditions, as borrowing always comes with risks and responsibilities. Make sure to understand the interest rates and repayment terms before you commit.
twitterThread:
💡 Big news for SOL holders! Coinbase now lets you borrow up to $100K using your Solana as collateral. No need to sell!

Here's how it works:

In plain English: You lock up your SOL as security and get a loan. Think of it like a car loan, but with crypto.

The part that matters: You keep your SOL while accessing cash.

This is powered by Morpho, a decentralized lending platform, and runs on Coinbase's Base blockchain.

If you've ever wanted to unlock the value of your crypto without selling, this could be a game-changer.

But remember: Borrowing always comes with risks. Make sure you understand the interest rates and repayment terms before you jump in.

Here's what to do next:

If you hold SOL on Coinbase, check out this new loan feature. It's a way to get liquidity while keeping your long-term investment intact.

Full breakdown → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-12-coinbase-launches-solana-backed-loans-via-morpho
